title: Simplified Create
body:
this texture pack simplifies create and makes it cleaner, its based on the Bare Bones texture pack but integrated to create, still WIP, a lot of block textures are missing, if you think any texture is wrong and should be changed, ask me

this texture pack is for 1.21.1 but also works on all the 1.20.x versions, as long as you have Create 6.x
